title: Mine mine no mi Haki and fighting style Item
description: This mod, inspired by a video, gives players all Haki and fighting-style items from Mine Mine no Mi directly in their inventory without granting powers. It’s a cosmetic, roleplay-focused add-on that enhances fun while keeping gameplay balanced.
body: This add-on for Mine Mine no Mi is inspired by a popular video that showcased Haki and fighting-style items purely for visual and roleplay fun. The mod recreates that idea by placing every Haki and fighting-style item directly into the player’s inventory without granting any actual powers. Players can collect, display, and use these items for decoration, storytelling, or themed adventures, making roleplay and world-building more enjoyable. By keeping everything cosmetic, the add-on preserves normal gameplay balance while giving players more creative freedom. It’s a simple, fun way to enhance the Mine Mine no Mi experience without changing the core mechanics.
